nasb.text: Bethuel became the father of Rebekah; these eight Milcah bore to Nahor, Abraham’s brother.

esv.text: (Bethuel fathered Rebekah.) These eight Milcah bore to Nahor, Abraham’s brother.

cnv.text: ”這八個人，都是密迦給亞伯拉罕的兄弟拿鶴生的兒子。

ccb.text: 密迦为亚伯拉罕的兄弟拿鹤生了八个儿子。

csbs.text: 彼土利生了莉白加。美尔迦为亚伯拉罕的兄弟拿鹤生了这八个儿子。
